entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A high protein food crop discussed for its scientific and nutritional aspects and used in various recipes.

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: Crops grown in semi-arid tropics and marginal environments that serve as a primary protein source for vegetarians.

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Crops that dominate the food production balance in most countries.

entities.name: PROTEIN AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The accessibility of essential food proteins for the population, particularly the poor in semi-arid tropics.

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: The scientific and nutritional aspects of food consumption for human health.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographic region where legumes are generally grown.

entities.name: MARGINAL ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Low input and risk-prone environments characterized by low and unstable yields.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of crops, which is noted as low and unstable in marginal environments.

entities.name: VEGETARIANS
entities.description: People who derive their food proteins primarily from legumes.

entities.name: POPULATION GROWTH
entities.description: The continuous increase in population contributing to the decline in protein availability.
